arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola admits he now agrees with infamous Jose Mourinho quote after Man City woes
arts.sum: Manchester City have fallen way below their usual standards during what has been a dismal season, and now Pep Guardiola is on the same page as his old foe Jose Mourinho

Pep Guardiola is hoping he can have Manuel Akanji and the rest of his Manchester City defenders available before the end of the season. With the injuries that City have suffered this season, Guardiola said it would be a big achievement to qualify for the 2025/26 Champions League.

arts.ttl: Guardiola outlines forward options after Haaland injury
arts.sum: Ahead of Wednesday’s visit of Leicester City, the boss was asked whether January signing Omar Marmoush is ready to play as the focal point. “He [Marmoush] can play there,” Pep began.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola names four Man City replacements for Erling Haaland but lets top four doubts slip
arts.sum: Manchester City must prepare for a Premier League run-in without 30-goal striker Erling Haaland but Pep Guardiola has options.

arts.ttl: Savinho hoping for same again in Foxes clash
arts.sum: “We’re happy to have qualified for the semi-finals and to play at Wembley again, which is such a beautiful stadium. “I was really happy with my goal against Leicester last time, especially the first half [performance],” said Savinho.

arts.ttl: Theory on what is holding up Man City's 130 charges verdict as huge points deduction touted
arts.sum: Manchester City were charged with breaching financial fair play rules by the Premier League, with the charges covering a nine-year period from 2009 to 2018

arts.sum: Atletico Madrid have set their sights on one of the South America’s brightest talents, but signing him will not be easy – and not only because Manchester City are also said to be sniffing around. Last week, it was reported that Atleti have registered their interest in Franco Mastantuono.
